title: AIIMS Bilaspur Notification 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for 70 Senior Resident Posts
description: All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill 70 Senior Resident Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in MBBS, MD/ MS, DNB, and Post Graduation candidates who have qualified in the AIIMS Bilaspur Notification 2026 . Here we have included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts.
